query:
I'm currently tailing the unimatrix log and seeing: 2026-03-21T12:54:32.801607Z  WARN unimatrix_engine::auth: process lineage check failed for pid 27933: process lineage verification failed: cannot read /proc/27933/cmdline: No such file or directory (os error 2) (advisory, allowing connection)
2026-03-21T12:54:32.801611Z  WARN unimatrix_engine::auth: process lineage check failed for pid 27933: process lineage verification failed: cannot read /proc/27933/cmdline: No such file or directory (os error 2) (advisory, allowing connection)
2026-03-21T12:54:32.801774Z  WARN unimatrix_server::uds::listener: UDS connection handler error error=early eof
2026-03-21T12:54:32.801983Z  INFO unimatrix_server::uds::listener: UDS: event recorded event_type="PostToolUse" session_id="45c89139-120d-4f09-bcd6-ee77df500279"
2026-03-21T12:54:32.802167Z  WARN unimatrix_server::uds::listener: UDS connection handler error error=Broken pipe (os error 32)
2026-03-21T12:54:37.324758Z  WARN unimatrix_engine::auth: process lineage check failed for pid 27983: process lineage verification failed: cannot read /proc/27983/cmdline: No such file or directory (os error 2) (advisory, allowing connection)
2026-03-21T12:54:37.324751Z  WARN unimatrix_engine::auth: process lineage check failed for pid 27983: process lineage verification failed: cannot read /proc/27983/cmdline: No such file or directory (os error 2) (advisory, allowing connection)
2026-03-21T12:54:37.324953Z  WARN unimatrix_server::uds::listener: UDS connection handler error error=early eof
2026-03-21T12:54:37.325202Z  INFO unimatrix_server::uds::listener: UDS: event recorded event_type="PreToolUse" session_id="45c89139-120d-4f09-bcd6-ee77df500279"
2026-03-21T12:54:37.325459Z  WARN unimatrix_server::uds::listener: UDS connection handler error error=Broken pipe (os error 32)
2026-03-21T12:54:37.356915Z  WARN unimatrix_engine::auth: process lineage check failed for pid 27989: process lineage verification failed: cannot read /proc/27989/cmdline: No such file or directory (os error 2) (advisory, allowing connection)
2026-03-21T12:54:37.356920Z  WARN unimatrix_engine::auth: process lineage check failed for pid 27989: process lineage verification failed: cannot read /proc/27989/cmdline: No such file or directory (os error 2) (advisory, allowing connection)

entries.title: ADR-003 nan-003: context_status Pre-flight Check for /unimatrix-seed
Kill stale server processes before database migration
Pre-existing pool timeout failures in unimatrix-server unit tests (GH#303)
